title: Invariant Engine Implementation
purpose: Implement the invariant validation engine that runs globally, validates cross-system consistency, emits violations to the event bus, and supports auto-remediation recommendations.
architectural_constraints: All violations emit critical governance events
Engine must not mutate state during validation
Support for severity-based filtering and batch validation
acceptance_criteria: Violations emitted to governance event bus with severity
Auto-remediation recommendations generated for recoverable violations
Cross-system consistency checks pass on clean state

traceability.description: Implemented invariant validation engine and invariant enforcement protocol
